spec.name: The Mudhole
spec.description: You stand in mud all the way up to your thighs and it is not too comfortable since you are used to a somewhat different environment. The sewer leads to the north of here. In the middle you can just make out an enormous drainpipe leading down.

north.description: North. The muddy junction lies in that direction.

down.description: The muddy drainpipe leads down through the mud, otherwise it is utterly dark.

extra_descs.description: It is as dark as tar and looks like something out of a toilet, on top of that, the smell is absolutely overwhelming.
